title: Aluminum Supply Shock — Gulf Smelters Stranded by Hormuz Closure
close_reason: Expired — duplicate. Theme is fully covered by the active High Conviction opp `aluminum-supply-shock`, which names AA as a primary ticker and articulates the same Hormuz/EGA/Alba physical supply destruction thesis. Aged out at 34 days as On Our Radar without unique additional angle worth promoting.
what_worked: Identifying the Alcoa brownfield-to-data-center monetization angle ($500M-$1B) as a non-commodity catalyst was useful framing.
what_didnt: Filed as a separate opp instead of as an amendment to the existing aluminum-supply-shock High Conviction entry — created a de-dup violation. Entry price not actively tracked, so no exit return computed.
would_have_done: Should have appended the brownfield data center angle to aluminum-supply-shock's body_md and ticker_rationale rather than opening a second AA entry.
